历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science fluctuated significantly: 465 → 643 → 120, showing a clear odd-even year pattern; in 2024, the ranking dropped sharply (from 465 to 643), then surged to 120 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 120th place; the provincial Science enrollment plan was 14 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 9 in 2025, and remains 9 in 2026, unchanged for two consecutive years with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has fluctuated from 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, showing a steady rise in recent years, entering the top 12 nationally in 2026, with continuously enhanced overall competitiveness; reputation in 2024 was neutral/mixed, with abnormal admission cutoff signals but also positive campus open events; reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and relatively high application attention; Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, and 17 other A- or above disciplines, with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring Science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous majors at HIT continue to have high social popularity; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 238,000 (including uncertain marks), a significant increase from the 52,500 Science examinees in 2025, intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, with a very small enrollment share in Xinjiang (9 each year from 2023 to 2025), making it a long-distance cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the odd-even year characteristic of the abnormal ranking advance in 2025 (120th), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province, and the rise in school ranking, it is expected that the Science ranking in 2026 will somewhat correct from the extreme high of 2025, but the rising school reputation and increased examinee numbers will support the ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 170th, with a range of 149–191.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class, studying at Shenzhen Campus)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 149–191, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Future Technology Top Talent Class and Autonomous Intelligence as main targets, with Tier 1 Academician Special Class as a reach, and Tier 3 Greater Bay Area Class/Zhongguancun Class/Top Class as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than 191, you can focus on reaching for the Academician Special Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 477 → 421 → 392, showing a year-on-year upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative upward shift of about 85 places over the past three years; the 2025 baseline is about 392; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 6 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and will be reduced to 5 in 2026, a decrease of 3 compared to 2025 (a 37.5% reduction), which is a significant contraction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable and rising ranking; the overall level of the school is also attractive to liberal arts students; reputation was neutral/mixed in 2024 and neutral/mixed in 2026; Douyin popularity overall ranking 10th (high heat), with high overall attention to the school; HIT is known for engineering, but its liberal arts enrollment major is the Economic Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Sociology, Law, etc.), among which Business Administration is rated A-, which has some appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of economics and management is divided and wait-and-see; the popularity of finance and economics majors has cooled compared to previous years; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 24,000 liberal arts students in 2025, intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, with very few liberal arts enrollment spots in Xinjiang (only 5 in 2026), making it a long-distance cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the year-on-year upward trend in liberal arts rankings, the significant 37.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the increase in the total number of examinees in the province, but the large increase in examinees puts upward pressure on rankings; weighing both factors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be about 314, with a range of 276–352.
